commands_run.cmd: python3.12 -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0,'tools'); import axxon_mcp_server; import axxon_mcp_acfa_vmda_control"

criteria.reason: _write_gate (axxon_mcp_acfa_vmda_control.py:104-109) returns disabled when not self.enabled (enabled defaults to AXXON_CONTROL_APPROVE==1), gap when confirmation != CONFIRM-control-action, None otherwise. Both perform_unit_action and vmda_cleanup call _write_gate before any wire call. Gate tests assert inst.client.calls == [] (lines 181, 187, 215).

list_unit_actions (lines 111-126) streams AcfaService.ListUnitsActions and returns {status: ok, units: [{uid, actions:[{id,name,input:[{id,type}]}]}]}. Empty uids -> {status: error} before _stub_and_pb2; test_list_unit_actions_empty_is_error_no_wire asserts calls == [].

perform_unit_action (lines 128-147) calls AcfaService.PerformAction, returns applied when error_message empty else action-error; missing uid/action_id -> error before stub; properties mapped into request.properties via PropertyDescriptor. Tests confirm applied/action-error/missing-no-wire and recorded call shape.

vmda_cleanup (lines 149-169) calls VMDAService.Cleanup, discovers */VMDA_DB.N/Database via _vmda_database_ap when database omitted, strips hosts/<server>/ prefix from camera_id, returns applied+result; missing camera_id -> error no wire; no db -> gap. Tests cover discovery+strip, missing-camera-no-wire, no-leak.

Server has all six control wiring edits (param line 63, conditional register lines 193-194, register_control_tools with 4 @server.tool lines 975-994, --enable-control flag lines 1523-1525, flag-gated instantiation lines 1694-1698, control=control line 1727). Full suite Ran 824 OK; control suite 11 OK; no-leak test passing. Corpus AcfaService.PerformAction and VMDAService.Cleanup both live_status tested-pass; coverage doc shows 212 tested-pass and item 10r; restamp dry-run 0.

live_only_note: Gate matrix, reversible ARM->DISARM round-trip, and vmda_cleanup on an empty camera are recorded in raw/live-verify.txt and treated as the recorded artifact (no stand creds available to verifier).
